nodes.itemHTML: • redux-logicstars1.8k - Redux middleware for organizing business logic and action side effects.
• redux-observablestars7.8k - RxJS middleware for action side effects in Redux using "Epics".
• remote-redux-devtoolsstars1.8k - Redux DevTools remotely.
• redux-observablestars7.8k - RxJS middleware for action side effects in Redux using "Epics".
• redurxstars97 - Redux'ish Functional State Management using RxJS.
• redux-rollbar-middleware - Redux middleware that wraps exceptions in actions and sends them to Rollbar with current state.
• Laravel Collection Macrosstars1.5k - A set of handy collection macros
• #inqlude - The most well-known aggregation of Qt-centric libraries out there. A package manager is also available here.
• Linux-Apps.com - Despite the name, Linux-Apps.com aggregates a wide variety of Qt-based tools and libraries for both end-users and developers.

• Stephan Binner's Ubuntu PPAs - Ubuntu users who are hesitant to install anything outside of their package managers can obtain any recent version of Qt from these repositories. Instructions for adding them are found within.
• Google Earth - The virtual globe.
• Tailorstars1.7k - Streaming layout service for front-end microservices, inspired by Facebook's BigPipe.
• Arkade London - Arkade London is a pure personal and experimental webVJ fan art.
• Scons - A software construction tool configured with a Python script.
• Premake - A tool configured with a Lua script to generate project files for Visual Studio, GNU Make, Xcode, Code::Blocks, and more across Windows, Mac OS X, and Linux.
• LightNodestars174 - Micro RPC/REST Framework built on OWIN http://neuecc.github.io/LightNode.
• WebAPIContrib for ASP.NET COREstars455 - Community Contributions for ASP.NET Core.
• go-dotnetstars432 - Go wrapper for the .NET Core Runtime.
• BundlerMinifierstars583 - Visual Studio extension that let's you configure bundling and minification of JS, CSS and HTML files.
• Stack Exchange Redisstars5.3k - High performance general purpose redis client for .NET languages (C# etc).
• Platformus - Free, open source and cross-platform CMS based on ASP.NET Core 1.0 and ExtCore framework.
• SimpleContentstars325 - Simple, yet flexible content and blog engine for ASP.NET Core that can work with or without a database.

• npgsqlstars2.7k - .NET data provider for PostgreSQL. It allows any program developed for .NET framework to access a PostgreSQL database server. It is implemented in 100% C# code. PostgreSQL versions since 9.1 are officially supported, others may work. http://www.npgsql.org
• ravendb - Linq enabled document database for .NET.
• RethinkDb.Driverstars373 - C#/.NET RethinkDB driver with 100% ReQL API coverage.
• SimplCommercestars3.7k - Super simple ecommerce system built on .NET Core.
• rider - Cross-platform C# IDE based on the IntelliJ platform and ReSharper.
• Omnisharp - Family of Open Source projects, each with one goal: To enable a great .NET experience in YOUR editor of choice.

• Visual Studio Codestars137.8k - New type of tool that combines the simplicity of a code editor with what developers need for their core edit-build-debug cycle. Code provides comprehensive editing and debugging support, an extensibility model, and lightweight integration with existing tools.
• Visual Studio Community - Free editor for individual developers, open source projects, academic research, education, and small professional teams.
• Autofacstars4k - Addictive .NET IoC container.
• SimpleInjectorstars1.1k - Easy, flexible, and fast Dependency Injection library that promotes best practice to steer developers towards the pit of success.
• dnxcore-logging-logstashstars8 - Logstash logging extension for .NET Core applications with UDP and Redis transports.
• MailKitstars5k - Cross-platform .NET library for IMAP, POP3, and SMTP.
• MimeKitstars1.5k - Cross-platform .NET MIME creation and parser library with support for S/MIME, PGP, DKIM, TNEF and Unix mbox spools.
• AutoMapperstars9k - Convention-based object-object mapper in .NET.
• CommonMark.NETstars983 - The implementation of CommonMark specification in C# for converting Markdown documents to HTML.
• markdigstars3.2k - Fast, powerfull, CommonMark compliant, extensible Markdown processor for .NET.
• Scrutorstars2.6k - Assembly scanning extensions for Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.

• Entity Framework Corestars11.8k - Familiar developer experience to previous versions of EF, including LINQ, POCO, and Code First support.
    • EFCore.BulkExtensionsstars2.8k - EntityFrameworkCore Bulk Batch Extensions for Insert Update Delete Read (CRUD) ops
    • EntityFramework-Plusstars2k - Entity Framework Utilities | Bulk Operations | Batch Delete | Batch Update | Query Cache | Query Filter | Query Future | Query Include | Audit.
    • EntityFramework.Exceptionsstars594 - Use typed Exceptions for EntityFrameworkCore when your SQL query violates database constraints in SqlServer, MySql, or PostgreSQL.
    • EntityFramework.Triggersstars355 - Trigger events for EF.
    • EntityFramework.Rxstars128 - Reactive hot observables of your EF operations.
    • Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQLstars1.1k - Entity Framework Core provider for PostgreSQL.
    • EntityFramework.PrimaryKeystars43 - Easily get the primary key of any entity (including composite keys).
    • EntityFramework.TypedOriginalValuesstars33 - Get a proxy object of the original values of your entity (typed access to Property("...").OriginalValue).
    • EntityFramework.VersionedPropertiesstars37 - Classes which auto-magically keep an audit history of the changes to the specified property.
    • LINQKitstars1.3k - A free set of extensions for LINQ to SQL and Entity Framework power users.
    • Pomelo.EntityFrameworkCore.MySqlstars2.3k - Entity Framework Core provider for MySql built on top of mysql-net/MySqlConnector.
    • spectre.querystars38 - A simple query language for Entity Framework Core.
• NReco.Datastars169 - Lightweight provider-independent DAL for SQL commands generation, CRUD operations and simple POCO mapping.
• MediatR.Extensions.Microsoft.DependencyInjectionstars294 - MediatR extensions for Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.
• MicroBusstars211 - Simple in process mediator for .NET.
• HangfireIOstars7.8k - Easy way to perform fire-and-forget, delayed and recurring tasks inside ASP.NET apps http://hangfire.io.
• SolrExpressstars65 - Simple and lightweight query .NET library for Solr, in a controlled, buildable and fail fast way.
• Newtonsoft.Jsonstars9.6k - Popular high-performance JSON framework for .NET.
• protobuf-netstars4k - Protocol Buffers library for idiomatic .NET.
• TinyCsvParserstars336 - Easy to use, easy to extend and high-performance library for CSV parsing with .NET.
• Bogusstars6.3k - Simple and sane fake data generator for C#. Based on and ported from the famed faker.js.
• MyTested.AspNetCore.Mvcstars1.6k - Fluent testing framework for ASP.NET Core MVC.
• Netlingstars1.3k - Load tester client for easy web testing.
• nunitstars68 - NUnit test runner for .NET Core.
• shouldlystars1.7k - Should testing for .NET - the way Asserting Should be! http://shouldly.readthedocs.org/en/latest
• TestStack.BDDfystars390 - The simplest BDD framework EVER!
• WampSharpstars377 - C# implementation of The Web Application Messaging Protocol - Protocol that provides messaging patterns of Remote Procedure Calls and Publish/Subscribe over WebSockets.

• ASP.NET Core Starter Kitstars1.1k - Opinionated boilerplate for web development based on .NET Core, Kestrel, GraphQL on the backend and Babel, Webpack, React and Redux on the frontend. This boilerplate comes in both C# and F# flavors.
• saaskitstars1k - Developer toolkit for building SaaS applications.
• CakeExcel pluginstars22 - An Excel view to generate XLSX files.
• jitwatch-intellijstars165 - JITWatch plugin for IntelliJ IDEA.
• Ian Sommerville http://iansommerville.com/systems-software-and-technology/
